description_long: This is a compact, cylindrical screwdriver with a knurled metal handle for enhanced grip. The handle features a textured, crosshatch pattern and is divided into three distinct segments by shallow grooves. One end of the tool has a short, straight shaft terminating in a small, precisely machined tip, while the opposite end is flat and slightly recessed. The entire object is finished in a dark metallic color, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. The tool appears to be made entirely of metal, likely steel, and is designed for durability and precision in tight spaces. No visible branding or markings are present on the surface.
description: A compact, all-metal screwdriver with a knurled, textured handle and a small, straight tip. The tool is dark metallic and robust, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the screwdriver, highlighting the knurled handle and the straight tip.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, showing the circular, hollowed end and the handle's segmented texture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the handle's knurling and the straight tip from the other side.
description_view_3: End-on view of the tip, showing the small, straight shaft and the rounded end of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: straight, knurled metal handle with crosshatch texture for grip
